task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and three PDF files are provided under /home/user/Documents/: attention.pdf, bert.pdf, deep_learning.pdf.

Attach each PDF as a stored child attachment to the matching existing item:
- /home/user/Documents/attention.pdf → 'Attention Is All You Need'
- /home/user/Documents/bert.pdf → 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers'
- /home/user/Documents/deep_learning.pdf → 'Deep Learning'

After completion, each of the three items must have at least one child PDF attachment. Leave Zotero running.
